title: Cells copy instructions before splitting

title: Volcanoes carve valleys faster than rivers

title: Rock layers store ancient environments in stripes

title: Rocks grow upward without roots or seeds
script_key: rocks grow upward from the ground but not like plants sandstone layers stack because wind and water carve softer rock away leaving the hard stuff standing taller that s why cliff walls look like stacked bricks notice how the edges stay sharp that s erosion working in reverse
